tasks.label: 01-init-maven
args: if ! mvn --version 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '3\.(8\.[6-9]|8\.[1-9][0-9]|9\.|[1-9][0-9])'; then echo "Upgrading Maven..." && curl -sSL https://archive.apache.org/dist/maven/maven-3/3.9.9/binaries/apache-maven-3.9.9-bin.tar.gz | tar xz -C /home/user && echo 'export PATH=/home/user/apache-maven-3.9.9/bin:$PATH' >> /home/user/.bashrc && export PATH=/home/user/apache-maven-3.9.9/bin:$PATH && mvn --version; else echo "Maven version OK: $(mvn --version | head -1)"; fi

tasks.label: 04-open-rhda-report
args: REPORT_PATH="${REPORT_PATH:-/tmp/redhatDependencyAnalyticsReport.html}"; echo "RHDA report path: ${REPORT_PATH}"; if [ -f "${REPORT_PATH}" ]; then ls -lh "${REPORT_PATH}"; echo "Tip: open it from the file explorer inside Dev Spaces."; else echo "Report file not found yet."; echo "Generate it in the IDE by opening pom.xml and running 'Red Hat Dependency Analytics Report...'"; fi

tasks.label: 05-update-quarkus-to-3.27.3.redhat-00002
args:
export PATH=/home/user/apache-maven-3.9.9/bin:$PATH
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import re

pom = Path('pom.xml')
s = pom.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
new_version = '3.27.3.redhat-00002'
s2, n = re.subn(
    r'(<quarkus\.platform\.version>)([^<]+)(</quarkus\.platform\.version>)',
    r'\g<1>' + new_version + r'\g<3>',
    s,
    count=1,
)
if n != 1:
    raise SystemExit('ERROR: Could not find <quarkus.platform.version>...</quarkus.platform.version> in pom.xml')
pom.write_text(s2, encoding='utf-8')
print(f'Updated quarkus.platform.version to {new_version}')
PY
mvn -q -DskipTests package
